title: Trump does it again
bodyText:
Breaking News

INTERNATIONAL NEWS - Donald Trump is returning to the White House. The latest count shows Trump has amassed 277 electoral votes, 7 more than the 270 needed to declare a win.

Kamala Harris of the Democrats only won 224 electoral votes. Trump, who was the 45th president of the United States of America, is now also the 47th.


> The Republicans, who will be in control of the US Senate, will rule the USA for the next four years.


Trump thanked his supporters, saying he would heal America, while Harris cancelled her post election speech, announcing she will address her supporters later.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
